# Plan: Synthetic Closer Ticket (GOOD bundle)

## Scope
Fixture plan — no forbidden commands in this artifact.

## Phases

### Phase 1: Review
Read all modified files, confirm diff is clean.

### Phase 2: Test
Run the full test suite via the tier runner: `RUN_EXPENSIVE_TESTS=1 npm run test:expensive`

### Phase 3: Commit and close
Commit changes and update ticket status.
